tier1.name: Anthony Eugene
tier1.last_message: Are they done cutting. Those trunk are quite high. And the neighbor on my right said your guys dropped stuff in her yard which they need cleaned up. Their name: Bryan and Lauren
tier1.action: Call immediately. Verify crew status. Coordinate cleanup of neighbor Bryan & Lauren's yard ASAP.
tier1.suggested_reply: Hi Anthony, I'm checking with the crew right now. We sincerely apologize about the debris — we'll get Bryan and Lauren's yard cleaned up today. I'll call you with an update within the hour.

tier1.name: Cristen Brown
tier1.action: This is a CLOSE. Assign an owner. Send scheduling options. Move pipeline to Work Scheduled.
tier1.suggested_reply: Awesome, Cristen! We're excited to get started. What days work best for you? I'll get you locked in.

tier1.name: Eddie Muse
tier1.last_message: Just keep me posted with your schedule. Thanks,
tier1.action: High-value repeat customer ($39,500 total). Respond with scheduling update immediately.
tier1.suggested_reply: Hi Eddie, absolutely! We're looking at [dates] for your project. I'll confirm the exact date by end of day tomorrow.

tier1.name: Richard Swormar
tier1.last_message: Any day but the 11th i have a Dr's appointment
tier1.action: Ready to schedule. Avoid March 11th. Book and move to Work Scheduled.
tier1.suggested_reply: Perfect, Richard! We'll avoid the 11th. How about [date]? I'll get you on the calendar right away.

tier1.name: Marie Breen
tier1.last_message: Hi this is DeAngelos Land Services LLC, I saw that we just missed your call how can I help?
tier1.action: Call back ASAP. 4 unread messages = repeated attempts to reach you.
tier1.suggested_reply: Hi Marie, so sorry we missed you! I'm available now — give me a call back or let me know a good time.

tier1.name: Cindy Fiacco
tier1.action: Customer has PAID and is waiting for service. Respond with crew schedule immediately.
tier1.suggested_reply: Hi Cindy! We have you scheduled for [date]. The crew will arrive between [time window]. I'll confirm the day before.

tier2.name: Mireya Booher
tier2.last_message: Thank you for the estimate. I just need to submit the application to my hoa
tier2.action: Offer HOA documentation support (scope of work letter, insurance cert).
tier2.suggested_reply: Hi Mireya, absolutely! If you need any documentation for your HOA, just let me know and I'll send it right over.

tier2.name: Judy Caruthers
tier2.last_message: I like the mock ups, my nephew's are looking at everything including cost since the will be paying. My one nephew is saying to hold off for the markets to recover from Iran.
tier2.action: High value. Don't push — offer locked pricing for 30 days.
tier2.suggested_reply: Hi Judy, glad you like the mockups! Just so you know, we can lock in this pricing for 30 days. Whenever your family is ready, we're here.

tier2.name: Tammy Ammerman
tier2.last_message: I did my husband is looking over will let you know something next week
tier2.action: Set reminder to follow up next week if no response.
tier2.suggested_reply: Sounds great, Tammy! Take your time. If either of you have questions, don't hesitate to reach out.

tier2.name: Howard Hartman
tier2.last_message: We are flexible. There was just a hiccup on our side.
tier2.action: Ready to reschedule. Offer new dates.
tier2.suggested_reply: No worries at all, Howard! How about [2-3 date options]? Let me know what works.

tier2.name: Lay Hodge
tier2.last_message: We are now in the process of picking our contractors and should have an idea when things will begin by next week.
tier2.action: Major account. Stay top of mind. Assign an owner.
tier2.suggested_reply: Great to hear, Lay! We're ready whenever you are. Just let us know.

tier2.name: Roberta & Claude Cromer
tier2.last_message: We have to leave at 11:15 on March 10 to make the tour.
tier2.action: Appointment constraint. Plan to finish before 11:15 AM.
tier2.suggested_reply: Got it! We'll wrap up well before 11:15 on the 10th. See you then!

tier2.name: Elise Johnson
tier2.suggested_reply: Great, Elise! You're all set. We'll see you [date/time].

tier3.name: Brian Russell
tier3.message: Recovering from a stroke. Maybe June.

tier3.name: Mathew Cummings
tier3.message: Thank you! Have a good weekend.

tier4_pipeline_updates.name: Lief Erickson
tier4_pipeline_updates.update_to: Review full history. 12 unread = red flag

missed_calls.action: Monitor for reply to missed call text
Inbound call, no body. Try calling back.

cancelled_appointments.name: Krystal Baumann
cancelled_appointments.last_message: Happy to hear she's back in action. It's hard to slow a toddler down. Blessing and a curse. See you tomorrow. Have a wonderful day.
cancelled_appointments.action: RESCHEDULE IMMEDIATELY. Customer is warm and engaged. Move opportunity back from Lost to Estimate Scheduled.
cancelled_appointments.suggested_reply: Hi Krystal! Sorry about the reschedule — everything's back to normal. What day works for you this week? I'd love to come take a look.

cancelled_appointments.name: Kelisha Hart
cancelled_appointments.last_message: Hi Kelisha, your appointment between 12:00 PM and 1:00 PM on Wednesday has been cancelled. When's a good day and time to reschedule you for?
cancelled_appointments.action: Follow up again. The original reschedule ask got no reply.
cancelled_appointments.suggested_reply: Hey Kelisha! Just circling back — we'd love to get you on the schedule. What works for you this week or next?

cancelled_appointments.name: Colby Smith
cancelled_appointments.last_message: Hi Colby, your appointment between 11:30 AM and 12:30 PM on Monday has been cancelled. When's a good day and time to reschedule you for?
cancelled_appointments.action: Final follow-up attempt. If no reply, mark as cold.
cancelled_appointments.suggested_reply: Hi Colby! Just wanted to check in one more time about rescheduling your estimate. We're happy to work around your schedule — just let us know!

cancelled_appointments.name: Phat Gagne
cancelled_appointments.last_message: Hey it's Anthony. We are still on course to meet in about 2 - 3 hours. See you soon!
cancelled_appointments.action: CONTRADICTORY DATA. Verify in GHL whether Phat was seen or not. If not, reach out to reschedule.
cancelled_appointments.suggested_reply: Hi Phat! Apologies for any confusion with scheduling. We'd love to still come out for your estimate — what day works best?

cancelled_appointments.name: Jackie Galdi
cancelled_appointments.action: One outreach attempt to reschedule. If no response, close.
cancelled_appointments.suggested_reply: Hi Jackie! We had to reschedule your estimate visit. We'd love to still come take a look — are you still interested? We have openings this week.

cancelled_appointments.name: Claud Bowers
cancelled_appointments.action: No reschedule. Close out. Mark conversation as read.

cancelled_appointments.name: Katty Polo
cancelled_appointments.action: Outreach to reschedule. This was Anthony's lead.
cancelled_appointments.suggested_reply: Hi Katty! We had to reschedule your appointment. We'd love to still come out to Windermere for an estimate — what day works this week?

appointments.name: Elise Johnson
